title: Limited-edition food and still-life prints from NYC photographer Jesse Page.
announcement: Fall 2026 print collection now shipping. New Bedford Morning series added.
policy_welcome: Welcome. Each print is made to order and ships in 3-5 business days.
policy_payment: Payment via Etsy Payments and PayPal. Full payment due at checkout.
policy_shipping: Prints ship USPS Priority Mail with tracking. Domestic 3-5 days, international 7-14 days.
policy_refunds: Damaged prints replaced or refunded within 30 days of delivery. Buyer covers return shipping unless damaged in transit.
